remaining_params.SpellDescription: Each player creates a colorless artifact token named Banana with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add {R} or {G}. You gain 2 life."

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever an artifact an opponent controls is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control that's an Ape or Monkey.
Whenever NICKNAME attacks, defending player sacrifices an artifact.
